summary: Admin Dashboard UI frontend testing completed. All pages load correctly, navigation works, CRUD operations functional. Fixed 1 bug in AdminBlogEditorPage.js where author field displayed [object Object] instead of author name.

bugs_fixed.issue: Author field displayed '[object Object]' when editing a blog post
bugs_fixed.root_cause: Backend returns author as an object {name, bio, avatar_url} but frontend was using post.author directly as a string
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed setAuthor(post.author || 'Safe-Spend Team') to setAuthor(typeof post.author === 'object' ? (post.author?.name || 'Safe-Spend Team') : (post.author || 'Safe-Spend Team')). Also fixed cover_image_url to handle both post.cover_image?.url and post.cover_image_url formats.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Dashboard UI fully tested. All pages working correctly. Fixed author field bug in blog editor. API key authentication working with ss_admin_... format. All navigation, CRUD operations, and session management working as expected.
